title: How agencies are managing 10 Twitter accounts with one person and 20 minutes a week
excerpt: TweetGenie replaces the entire agency stack: scheduling tools, analytics tools, content writers, and strategists.
content:
Current agency stack for Twitter:
- Scheduling tool: $100-500/month
- Analytics tool: $50-200/month  
- Content writer: $1500/month
- Strategist: $2000/month

TweetGenie replaces all of it.

## Teams Mode
Multiple accounts, one dashboard.

## RBAC
Different access levels for team members.

## Multi-account Strategy Generation
Build completely unique strategies for every client account.

## Cross-posting 
Automatically cross-post all Twitter wins to LinkedIn and Meta.

## Bulk Scheduling & Approval Workflows
Clients can approve before anything posts live.

[Check Agency Pricing](/pricing)
